name: _diag_ChannelStateChanged
title: _diag_ChannelStateChanged
description: Indicates the state of the diagnostic channel.

parameters.description: ClosedChannel not opened yet or already closed.
OpenedChannel opened but no request successfully send yet or the attempt to send a request failed.
ConnectedRequest successfully send, no response received yet or expected response missed.
OnlineRequest and response successfully send and received.
ClosePendingClose requested but still pending, state Closed will follow.
ConnectPendingStartCommunication requested but still pending, if succeed state Connected will follow, otherwise state Opened.
